//: lint_stale_refs baseline — references that survive a rename/delete in the PR diff. Fingerprint is file:ident. CI fails on a surviving reference absent here. Regenerate: python scripts/lint/lint_stale_refs.py --update-baseline. This baseline is normally empty (the check is diff-relative); an entry means a knowingly-tolerated stray reference. "" means un-triaged.

entries.defender/tests/spec_graph_538.yaml:_ORAC: #551 retired the oracle/verify deny-all policy constant; spec_graph_538.yaml is the frozen #538 planning artifact whose past-tense prose names the symbol that PR replaced — historical record, not a live reference to reword.
entries.defender/tests/spec_graph_538.yaml:for_r: #551 retired the per-role deps front-door factory methods; the #538 spec graph describes replacing them with bind — correct history, tolerated.
entries.defender/tests/spec_graph_538.yaml:for_s: #551 retired the judge/actor scope-taking deps factories; the #538 spec graph's demand + R5 witness name them as the things bind replaces — historical record, not a live reference.
entries.defender/tests/spec_graph_538.yaml:reade: #551 renamed the full-set reader-lane builder to its _for-suffixed twin; the #538 spec graph's past-tense characterization prose keeps the original name as history.
entries.defender/tests/test_harness_b_constructi: Reference is to an existing sibling test module (still present in the tree), a gate over-match, not a stale symbol.
